ASBESTOS LAW AND MOTION 503, DEFENDANT KELLY-MOORE PAINT CO., INC.'S JOINDER TO DEFENDANT FORD MOTOR COMPANY'S MOTION TO TRANSFER VENUE AND STAY PROCEEDINGS PENDING TRANSFER IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. THE UNDERLYING MOTION WAS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR AND DEFENDANT'S JOINDER FAILED TO PROVIDE PROPER NOTICE PURSUANT TO C.C.P. 1005(B). DEFENDANT MAY RE-FILE TO COMPLY WITH THE NOTICE REQUIREMENTS OF C.C.P. 1005(B) AND C.C.P. 1010.6 IF USING ELECTRONIC SERVICE. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: TERI L. JACKSON, MATTER NOT REPORTED

Joinder To Defendant Ford Motor Company, Inc.S Motion To Transfer Venue And Stay Proceedings Pending Transfer
Off Calendar Oct-20-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Oren P. Noah, Esq., of BRAYTON & PURCELL (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiffs / opposing parties James C. Davidson, et al.
Raymond A. Greene, Esq., of BURNHAM BROWN (510-444-6800), appearing for defendant Borg-Warner Corporation

RULING:
DEFENDANT KELLY-MOORE PAINT COMPANY, INC.'S JOINDER TO DEFENDANT FORD MOTOR COMPANY, INC.'S MOTION TO TRANSFER VENUE AND STAY PROCEEDINGS PENDING TRANSFER

No objection was made and no other appearance, tentative ruling was adopted: Defendant Kelly-Moore Paint Co., Inc.'s joinder to defendant Ford Motor Company's motion to transfer venue and stay proceedings pending transfer: After considering oral arguments and the initial and supplemental papers, defendant's joinder is denied without prejudice. The underlying motion was taken off calendar and defendant's joinder failed to provide proper notice pursuant to C.C.P. 1005(b). Defendant may re-file to comply with the notice requirements of C.C.P. 1005(b) and C.C.P. 1010.6 if using electronic service. Order signed in open court. Judge: Teri L. Jackson, Matter not reported = (503/TLJ)

Joinder To Defendant Ford Motor Company, Inc.S Motion To Transfer Venue And Stay Proceedings Pending Transfer
Off Calendar Oct-06-2011 Continued To Oct-20-11 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 503
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Joseph R. Connelly III, Esq., of HAWKINS PARNELL THACKSTON & YOUNG (415-766-3208) appearing for defendant / moving party Kelly-Moore Paint Company, Inc.
Jennifer L. Alesio, Esq., of BRAYTON & PURCELL (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiffs / opposing parties James C. Davidson, et al.

RULING:
DEFENDANT KELLY-MOORE PAINT COMPANY, INC.'S JOINDER TO DEFENDANT FORD MOTOR COMPANY, INC.'S MOTION TO TRANSFER VENUE AND STAY PROCEEDINGS PENDING TRANSFER

Hearing held. The Court continued defendant Kelly-Moore Paint Company, Inc.'s joinder to defendant Ford Motor Company's motion to transfer venue and stay proceedings pending transfer to October 20, 2011 at 9:30 a.m. in Department 220. Plaintiff is allowed to file supplemental brief as to defendant's citation. Judge: Teri L. Jackson, Matter not reported = (503/TLJ)
